inputs.name: duration
inputs.description:
Defines the duration in milliseconds for which component
remains on the screen before it's automatically closed.

*Note:** The minimum supported value is `500` ms
and even if a lower value is set, the duration would remain `500` ms.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Indicates whether the component is open (visible).

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description: Defines the placement of the component.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired after the component is auto closed.
